title: fleroya stipulosa
intro: Fleroya stipulosa is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia, commonly known as the "Malaysian jasmine". It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fleroya stipulosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Fleroya stipulosa can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically in skincare products.
